_README: skill-description-overrides.json — stopgap layer for description enrichments
we want applied locally before upstream marketplace PRs merge.
When build_ecc_index.py parses a SKILL.md frontmatter, if the skill's
namespaced_slug appears here as a key, the override description is used
instead of the upstream description for tokenization + IDF.
RULE: each entry MUST track its corresponding upstream PR. When the PR
merges (and the marketplace cache picks up the new description), DELETE
the override entry — leaving stale overrides defeats the point.
Entries are sorted by upstream PR number for easy auditing.

everything-claude-code:canary-watch.description: Use this skill to monitor and verify a deployed URL after releases — checks HTTP endpoints, SSE streams, static assets, console errors, and performance regressions after deploys, merges, or dependency upgrades. Smoke / canary / post-deploy verification.
everything-claude-code:canary-watch.remove_when: PR #1910 merges and marketplace clone autopull picks up the new description

everything-claude-code:tdd-workflow.description: Use this skill for test-driven development — write tests first, then implement to make them pass. Red-green-refactor cycle. Test-first methodology for new features, bug fixes, and refactoring. Enforces 80%+ coverage including unit tests, integration tests, and E2E tests. TDD discipline.
everything-claude-code:tdd-workflow.upstream_pr: none — local-only enrichment (consider upstreaming if useful)
everything-claude-code:tdd-workflow.remove_when: upstream tdd-workflow description includes the test-first phrasing users naturally type

everything-claude-code:design-system.description: Use this skill to generate or audit design systems — components, tokens, UI library, visual consistency, style guide, branding. Review PRs that touch styling or component design. Korean: 디자인 시스템 / 컴포넌트 라이브러리.
everything-claude-code:design-system.upstream_pr: none — local-only enrichment (consider upstreaming if useful)
everything-claude-code:design-system.remove_when: upstream design-system description includes 'component' and 'token' tokens
